top_findings.summary: The skill requests permission to edit and clean up existing documentation files (e.g., CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md) and modify long code comments in the codebase, which extends beyond the stated primary purpose of "creating Blueprint structure from existing repo." While creating new files is necessary, altering or removing parts of existing user files (documentation and code comments) is not strictly required for structure creation and could lead to unintended changes or data loss without explicit user consent for each modification. This action is excessive as a minimal approach could involve creating Blueprint files without modifying other content.
